_publications._publicationTitle: The development of the PlexiQoL: A patient-reported outcome measure for adults with neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibromas
_publications._context: The PlexiQoL is the first disease-specific PRO assessing the ability of adults with NF-1 associated pNFs to meet their basic human needs. | The PlexiQoL questionnaire is a disease-specific QoL measure for adults with NF1-associated plexiform neurofibromas...consists of 18 items with a dichotomous response option

_publications._publicationTitle: The PlexiQoL, a patient-reported outcome measure on quality of life in neurofibromatosis type 1-associated plexiform neurofibroma: translation, cultural adaptation and validation into the Dutch language for the Netherlands

basicInfo.description: 18-item disease-specific patient-reported outcome measure assessing quality of life in adults with NF1-associated plexiform neurofibromas; measures ability to meet basic human needs using dichotomous True/Not True responses
basicInfo.scoringMethod: True/Not True response options (range 0-18, higher scores indicate worse quality of life)
basicInfo.psychometricProperties: good internal reliability (Person‐Separation Index = 0.84), internal consistency (Cronbach's alpha coefficient = 0.90), and reproducibility (test-retest reliability = 0.90); correlated with Nottingham health profile and 36‐Item Short Form Health Survey (p < 0.01)
